description: KanSiL appears to be a research/lab web presence hosting biomedical data and analysis tools. Its public sites include interfaces for miRNA–mRNA search and biological knowledge-graph exploration.
summary: kansil.org exposes one documented public HTTP API: the miRHub REST API on mirhub.kansil.org with a Swagger 2.0 spec; other kansil.org sites found are web apps or explicitly proxy data from external APIs rather than exposing their own developer surfaces.
